---
name: Feature request
about: A new tool integration, route, validator, or campaign pattern
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want to do

What mission or campaign pattern does this unblock?

## Proposed shape

What kind of change is this?

- [ ] New tool integration (cheap, medium, or heavy adoption tier?)
- [ ] New route or route extension
- [ ] New validator or claim-audit rule
- [ ] New evidence normalizer
- [ ] New campaign reference under `skills/biosymphony/references/campaigns/`
- [ ] Doc improvement
- [ ] Other

## Existing surface

Which existing files would change or be added? `skills/biosymphony/`, `skills/genecluster-superpowers/`, `docs/tooling/`, `tools/recommended/`, or somewhere else?

## Public-safety check

Does this require any private data, credentials, or provider state? If yes, propose how to keep it out of the public tree.
